typography.guidelines: Use 'Cairo' for elegant, modern Arabic/English headings. Use 'Tajawal' for clean and legible body text. Headings > 32px must use tracking-tight. Ensure fonts are imported via Google Fonts. For English, these fonts provide a clean sans-serif look. Avoid generic fonts like Inter for headings.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: The Crystal Variant. High blur (backdrop-blur-xl or 2xl). Solid 1px inner border to separate glass from background (border-white/10 in dark mode). Never use pure transparent backgrounds.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Diffuse ambient shadows. Dark mode: shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]. Light mode: shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)].
visual_enhancers.textures: Use a very subtle noise/grain overlay fixed over the background to prevent color banding and add a premium feel.

grids.dashboard_bento: High density bento grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4). gap-4 or gap-6. Primary stat cards take col-span-1. Main activity chart takes col-span-2 row-span-2. Recent conversations list takes col-span-1 row-span-2. Use h-full on children.
grids.conversations_list: List-based grid with wide gaps. Filter chips span full width.

layouts.overall: Sidebar navigation (RTL-aware: Right side in Arabic, Left side in English). Main content area with ample padding (p-6 to p-12).
layouts.import_page: Massive drag-and-drop zone centered. Dash-border (border-dashed border-2 border-border/40) with subtle glass fill.
layouts.conversation_detail: Chat-bubble layout. Assistant messages stretch slightly wider, user messages are compact. Highlight matching search terms.

motion.micro_interactions: Hover states must lift elements (-translate-y-1) and slightly brighten background. Use framer-motion for staggering list items.
motion.modals: Cmd+K search modal should animate scale and opacity from center.
motion.transitions: Specify transitions (transition-transform, transition-colors duration-200) instead of transition-all.

accessibility.contrast: Maintain 4.5:1 ratio. Glass panels must have adequate opacity behind text.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, filters, list items) MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

component_strategy.cards: Avoid standard white/black Shadcn cards. Override to use the custom glassmorphism surface variables. Add optical clarity via borders.
component_strategy.buttons: Pill-shaped or rounded-md. Primary action buttons should use a metallic/accent hue, not default blue.
component_strategy.forms: Inputs must have a subtle background and clear borders. Focus rings must be high contrast.
component_strategy.search: Cmd+K (or Ctrl+K) triggers a full glassmorphic spotlight search overlay.
component_strategy.toasts: Use Sonner. Ensure RTL positioning support (bottom-left for LTR, bottom-right for RTL).

media.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for UI. Use 'react-icons/si' for AI platforms (SiOpenai, SiAnthropic, SiGoogle, SiDependabot/custom for DeepSeek). Install via: yarn add react-icons lucide-react

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Build with RTL layout support natively. Use Tailwind logical properties (e.g., ms-, me-, ps-, pe-, border-s) instead of explicit left/right properties to support English and Arabic seamlessly.
Implement a language toggle that changes the dir='rtl' attribute on the document body/html.
Ensure 'Cairo' is applied to headings and 'Tajawal' to body text. Load via Google Fonts in index.css.
The Cmd+K live full-text search is critical. Implement an elegant glassmorphic command palette with highlighted text match snippets.
Build a robust Dashboard mimicking a high-end SaaS data tool. Use recharts with custom glassmorphism tooltips.
Implement conversation detail view with Markdown export capabilities and Role avatars.
DO NOT use generic Shadcn configurations without applying the Glassmorphic customizations.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic outputs, 'AI slop' aesthetics. Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy. DO NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). Use modern button styles. DO NOT center align the app container text-align. Add data-testid to all actionable items. DO NOT use complete transparent backgrounds in headers or overlays.
